testcase.name: findByBarcode_returnsApiResponseWithProductDto

'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists products cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists receipts cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists sale_items cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists sales cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists stock_movements cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists sync_conflicts cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists sync_logs cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists user_roles cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists users cascade Hibernate: create table products ( expiry_date date, is_active boolean, manufacturing_date date, min_stock_level integer, purchase_price numeric(10,2), selling_price numeric(10,2), stock_quantity integer, created_at timestamp(6), created_by bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at timestamp(6), barcode varchar(50) unique, category varchar(255), description varchar(255), image_url varchar(255), name varchar(255), unit varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table receipts ( discount_amount numeric(10,2), download_count integer, final_amount numeric(10,2), tax_amount numeric(10,2), total_amount numeric(10,2), created_at timestamp(6), downloaded_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, sale_id bigint not null, updated_at timestamp(6), user_id bigint not null, receipt_number varchar(50) unique, company_address varchar(255), company_email varchar(255), company_logo_url varchar(255), company_name varchar(255), company_phone varchar(255), customer_email varchar(255), customer_name varchar(255), customer_phone varchar(255), notes TEXT, payment_method varchar(255) check (payment_method in ('CASH','CARD','MOBILE_MONEY','BANK_TRANSFER','CREDIT')), qr_code_data varchar(255), status varchar(255) check (status in ('GENERATED','SENT','DELIVERED','FAILED')), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table sale_items ( discount numeric(10,2), product_purchase_price numeric(10,2), quantity integer, subtotal numeric(10,2), unit_price numeric(10,2), id bigint generated by default as identity, product_id bigint not null, sale_id bigint not null, product_barcode varchar(255), product_name varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table sales ( discount_amount numeric(10,2), final_amount numeric(10,2), tax_amount numeric(10,2), total_amount numeric(10,2), created_at timestamp(6), created_by bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, sale_date timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), customer_email varchar(255), customer_name varchar(255), customer_phone varchar(255), notes varchar(255), payment_method varchar(255) check (payment_method in ('CASH','CARD','MOBILE_MONEY','BANK_TRANSFER','CREDIT')), sale_number varchar(255) unique, status varchar(255) check (status in ('PENDING','COMPLETED','CANCELLED','REFUNDED')), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table stock_movements ( quantity integer not null, created_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, product_id bigint not null, updated_at timestamp(6), movement_type varchar(50), reason varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table sync_conflicts ( local_version integer, server_version integer, created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, resolved_at timestamp(6), user_id bigint not null, conflict_type varchar(50), entity_type varchar(50) not null, resolution_strategy varchar(50), conflict_details TEXT, entity_id varchar(255) not null, local_data TEXT not null, resolved_by varchar(255), server_data TEXT not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table sync_logs ( conflict_count integer, error_count integer, operations_count integer, success_count integer, id bigint generated by default as identity, processing_time_ms bigint, timestamp timestamp(6) not null, app_version varchar(255), device_id varchar(255), sync_session_id varchar(255), sync_type varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table user_roles ( user_id bigint not null, roles varchar(255) check (roles in ('ROLE_USER','ROLE_ADMIN','ROLE_MODERATOR')) ) Hibernate: create table users ( enabled boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at timestamp(6), email varchar(255) unique, first_name varchar(255), last_name varchar(255), password varchar(255), preferred_language varchar(255), username varchar(255) unique, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: alter table if exists products add constraint FKl0lce8i162ldn9n01t2a6lcix foreign key (created_by) references users Hibernate: alter table if exists receipts add constraint FK5l7p2xatwtr8if8pwnra5jrq0 foreign key (sale_id) references sales Hibernate: alter table if exists receipts add constraint FK7t0uo7yxjck29e967rny84ky4 foreign key (user_id) references users Hibernate: alter table if exists sale_items add constraint FK8g0sjiqs7tg055o06p6wawu39 foreign key (product_id) references products Hibernate: alter table if exists sale_items add constraint FK7tcpbc5c5mpnm8fl2phl8ep7l foreign key (sale_id) references sales Hibernate: alter table if exists sales add constraint FKhck7oc1oupp6pibt2tn2wge50 foreign key (created_by) references users Hibernate: alter table if exists user_roles add constraint FKhfh9dx7w3ubf1co1vdev94g3f foreign key (user_id) references users
